title: zenkerella schliebenii
intro: Zenkerella schliebenii, also known as the African stinkwood, is a plant species in the family Protaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, due to its rich content of essential oils and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Zenkerella schliebenii is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
